title: I Am Allowed to Receive What I Did Not Earn
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the rule that only worked-for money counts
excerpt: A short energy statement for the belief that money only belongs to you if you earned it through effort. The release names the earning rule; the allow names the capacity to receive without the usual transaction.
sourceNotes: Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you've received or are about to receive money you didn't work for, and guilt, discomfort, or the feeling that it doesn't quite count is present.

content.text: A short energy statement for the belief that money only counts if you worked for it in the conventional sense. Gifts, inheritances, windfalls, and settlements all run against this rule — and the rule makes receiving uncomfortable even when the money is legitimate and real.

I am ready to release every rule that says money only counts when I earned it through effort, that gifts are temporary, that windfalls must be dispersed, and that receiving without working for it means I don't really own it. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow the capacity to receive money that was given to me, to hold it steadily, to make clear decisions with it, and to let it belong to me as fully as any amount I have ever worked for. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
